author: @Amarevia

text:
Figure it out yourself! I didn't ask anybody either. >D
...
Get one Caipirinha video, save each frame as a picture, then trace them and alter them to look like whichever character you want. Draw about 5-10 frames, save them as gif images and put them together in a gif animator program. If you want to add music as well, use Windows Movie Maker.

text: Thanks! ^^ Well, I downloaded a few already existing Caipirinha videos, saved some frames as still pictures and referenced/traced the movement from them. The original is from Azumanga Daioh and it's probably the most detailed, since it was done by professional animators. I recommend using that one as a reference.
